message:
Add comprehensive JSON schema golden tests for CLI commands

- Test list --json schema: required fields, types, format validation
- Test search --json schema: SearchResult structure, nested prompt schema
- Test show --json schema: single object output, content validation
- Test error payloads: exact error structure, exit codes
- Cross-command consistency tests ensure schema matches across commands
- 28 new tests with 134 assertions to prevent accidental schema drift

Critical for agent integrations that depend on stable JSON contracts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
